title: Conduct of election
doc_html:
§589. Conduct of election

             The elections shall be conducted in accordance with the Louisiana Election Code.

            Acts 1987, No. 696, §1; Acts 2018, No. 334, §1, eff. May 15, 2018.
doc_text:
§589.  Conduct of election
The elections shall be conducted in accordance with the Louisiana Election Code.
Acts 1987, No. 696, §1; Acts 2018, No. 334, §1, eff. May 15, 2018.
